title: Connected Chains
description: A Resource Pack that makes chains longer to allow them to connect to other blocks
body:
# Connected Chains

With the Connected Chains Resource Pack your chains will better connect to non-full blocks and allow you to create more interesting and realistic builds using chains.

The pack is very lightweight only modifying the chain model itself allowing it to work well with other resource packs and mods.

## Using the pack your chains will connect to things such as:
- Walls and fences
- Chains facing other directions
- Flower pots
- Mob heads
- And more

Below are some pictures showcasing what you can do with this Resource Pack
![An animated gif showcasing the difference between vanilla and the custom chains](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d4b6df4eadedd17972646dbe3b34d6405345bd4.gif)
![A scene showcasing some different uses for the custom chains](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1e52c4c85f395dd8627771c7986aac23212681b_0.webp)
